mapper.sql: id , post_id , parent_id , member_id , content , writer , delete_yn , created_date , modified_date
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.parent_id, c.member_id, c.content, c.writer, c.delete_yn, c.created_date, c.modified_date, m.profile_image FROM tb_comment c LEFT JOIN tb_member m ON c.member_id = m.id WHERE c.id = #{value} AND c.delete_yn = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_comment SET delete_yn = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_comment SET delete_yn = 1 WHERE parent_id = #{value} AND delete_yn = 0
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.parent_id, c.member_id, c.content, c.writer, c.delete_yn, c.created_date, c.modified_date, m.profile_image FROM tb_comment c LEFT JOIN tb_member m ON c.member_id = m.id WHERE c.delete_yn = 0 AND c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY c.id DESC LIMIT #{pagination.limitStart}, #{recordSize}

SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.parent_id, c.member_id, c.content, c.writer, c.delete_yn, c.created_date, c.modified_date, m.profile_image FROM tb_comment c LEFT JOIN tb_member m ON c.member_id = m.id WHERE c.delete_yn = 0 AND c.parent_id = #{value} ORDER BY c.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_comment WHERE delete_yn = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_comment WHERE delete_yn = 0 AND post_id = #{postId} AND parent_id IS NULL
